description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a long, slightly curved handle made of wood with a black grip section, designed for two-handed use. The axe head is robust and painted a vivid red, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade suitable for chopping wood or breaking through obstacles. The blade has a single sharp edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, allowing for both cutting and striking tasks. The handle transitions smoothly from a natural wood finish to a black, textured grip, enhancing control and comfort during use. The mounting of the blade to the handle appears traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the handle. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on the axe.
description: A full-sized axe with a red wedge-shaped blade and a long, curved wooden handle with a black grip. Designed for chopping and striking tasks, it features a robust, traditional build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red blade edge and the black grip curving away from the viewer.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the handle and the wedge-shaped red blade.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the blade and the end of the black grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the blade.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a black, textured grip; oval cross-section; ergonomic for two-handed use.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped red blade with a flat poll; no beard; robust and functional.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle.
